title: Fix duplicate page in fullscreen PDF viewer (dbg98)
description:
After dbg97 fixed the blank fullscreen viewer, every stacked page showed the same sheet. Archive mode was assigning pdfPageNum=1 to all slots when archivePageIndex/pageIndex were missing (defaulting to 0). Per-piece mode was loading the shared archive signed URL from page.src before the per-piece storageKey, so every slot rendered page 1 of the same multi-page PDF.

dbg98 resolves page index from archivePageIndex, pdfPageIndex, pageIndex, "NN of MM" filename, or stack sort order; per-piece loads prefer storageKey over shared src.

Who is affected: OVH private server users in PDF Viewer fullscreen. SaaS unchanged until platform release applied.
changeLog: Resolve distinct pdfPageNum per slot (name parse + sort index fallback).
Per-piece PDF load: storageKey before shared archive src URL.
Diag: log slotPageNums at mount and first 3 renders (H-dup-page).
